summary: Frontend testing of /solutions/ai-infrastructure (AI Infrastructure detailed page with 23 BRD sections). All 16 rendered sections, counts, and CTAs verified via Playwright DOM checks. Page loads without errors. Other routes (/, /solutions, /contact) return 200.
critical_code_review_comments: AIInfrastructure.jsx is 261 lines with 16 inline section components in one file - acceptable but consider splitting into /sections/* if it grows further.

All data is colocated correctly in data/ai-infrastructure.js and counts match BRD: 12 problems, 10 rails, 10 principles, 11 pipeline steps, 6 layers, 5 pillars, 3 agent groups/8 agents, 20 governance, 12 approval queues, 5 scenarios, 9 architecture layers, 10 deployment, 16 use cases, 16 outcomes.
Hero DEXA Command Center shows exactly 12 nodes as required.
Final CTA correctly contains both 'Build AI Infrastructure' and 'Explore DEXA' buttons with proper data-testids.

data-testids are present and consistent across all 16 sections (ai-hero, ai-problem, ai-stack, ai-rails-visual, ai-dexa-engine, ai-functional-layers, ai-pillars, ai-agents, ai-governance, ai-approval, ai-scenarios, ai-architecture, ai-deployment, ai-use-cases, ai-outcomes, ai-final-cta).
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Infrastructure page is fully functional and matches all BRD requirements. Verified counts: hero=12 nodes, problems=12, stack=10 rails, rails-visual=10, dexa principles=10, pipeline=11, functional layers=6, pillars=5, agent groups=3 with 8 total agents, governance=20, approvals=12, scenarios=5, architecture=9 layers, deployment=10, use cases=16, outcomes=16. Final CTA has both Build AI Infrastructure and Explore DEXA buttons. Other routes (/, /solutions, /contact) load with 200 status.
rca of the issue: No issues found. No RCA required.
